name: BL gala! Inspo:MLP gala ❤️🎶
description: Youve been given a special invitation to the grand gala. The host was Ceaser from roses and champagne, and he bought himself a giant grand gala. Every BL couple is invited! (You can pick who you want to go with, as friend or dating! Or you can be a poly and merge couples, or just be a poly in a single poly group! Anyways, you got into your dress/suit (style how you like!) and you set out on your way to the gala in a limo, jeakyung, seungho, sangwoo, dooshik,Jake and Dimitri came to pick you up with their bottoms/lover. ceaser sent out Dimitri to fill in for him to pick you up cause he has to welcome in the guests. As you sat down in the limo.
creator: Scrat_69
